requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — IANORQ / Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——IANORQ / 项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——IANORQ / 項目證據

summary.en: For Angola EV charger imports and installations, the conservative safety baseline is IEC 61851-family evidence, especially IEC 61851-1 for conductive EV supply equipment and IEC 61851-23 for DC charging stations. IANORQ is the Angolan standards and quality body and may adopt or reference IEC standards through conformity/import review, while project owners, utilities, insurers, or lenders may require IEC-accredited safety evidence before acceptance. Because EV charging infrastructure is still nascent in Angola, exporters should not assume that a China GB/T file alone will be accepted.
summary.zh: 对于进入安哥拉的电动汽车充电桩进口和安装，保守的安全基线是IEC 61851体系证据，尤其是适用于传导式电动汽车供电设备的IEC 61851-1和适用于直流充电站的IEC 61851-23。IANORQ是安哥拉标准和质量机构，可能在合格评定/进口审查中采用或引用IEC标准；项目业主、公用事业单位、保险方或贷款方也可能在验收前要求IEC认可安全证据。由于安哥拉充电基础设施仍处于起步阶段，出口商不应假设单独的中国GB/T文件会被接受。
summary.zht: 對於進入安哥拉的電動汽車充電樁進口和安裝，保守的安全基線是IEC 61851體系證據，尤其是適用於傳導式電動汽車供電設備的IEC 61851-1和適用於直流充電站的IEC 61851-23。IANORQ是安哥拉標準和質量機構，可能在合格評定/進口審查中採用或引用IEC標準；項目業主、公用事業單位、保險方或貸款方也可能在驗收前要求IEC認可安全證據。由於安哥拉充電基礎設施仍處於起步階段，出口商不應假設單獨的中國GB/T文件會被接受。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IANORQ conformity or standards adoption process where applicable

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which covers conductive charging system general requirements but includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication assumptions. GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence can support an engineering gap review, but it does not by itself demonstrate IEC 61851 conformity for an Angola importer, IANORQ review, or project owner.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，涵盖传导式充电系统通用要求，但包含中国特有接口、信号和通信假设。GB/T 18487.1-2023证据可支持工程差距评估，但其本身不能向安哥拉进口商、IANORQ审查或项目业主证明IEC 61851符合性。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，涵蓋傳導式充電系統通用要求，但包含中國特有接口、信號和通訊假設。GB/T 18487.1-2023證據可支持工程差距評估，但其本身不能向安哥拉進口商、IANORQ審查或項目業主證明IEC 61851符合性。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, enclosure IP and mechanical-impact evidence, protective-device ratings, residual-current protection or monitoring details, emergency stop logic where applicable, installation instructions, and Portuguese / project-language documentation. A standalone GB/T 18487 report should be treated as a starting point, not Angola-ready safety evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全报告、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、外壳IP及机械冲击证据、保护器件额定值、剩余电流保护或监测细节、适用时的急停逻辑、安装说明，以及葡萄牙语/项目语言文件。单独的GB/T 18487报告应作为起点，而非可直接用于安哥拉的安全证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全報告、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、外殼IP及機械衝擊證據、保護器件額定值、剩餘電流保護或監測細節、適用時的急停邏輯、安裝說明，以及葡萄牙語/項目語言文件。單獨的GB/T 18487報告應作為起點，而非可直接用於安哥拉的安全證據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional but project-critical — IEC 61851 evidence should be expected where IANORQ, importer, site owner, utility, insurer, lender, or tender requires IEC-aligned charger safety; confirm exact edition and acceptance route before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence without clause-level gap assessment and accepted testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Angola-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851-1 evidence and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, plus enclosure, protection, installation, and commissioning records accepted by the local project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向安哥拉的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851-1证据、直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据，以及本地项目接受的外壳、保护、安装和调试记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向安哥拉的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851-1證據、直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據，以及本地項目接受的外殼、保護、安裝和調試記錄。
